Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 4 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}It must want my sister! She has the same power as the one who created the seal![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 4 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Are you... going to fight it!? You can't take on something like that![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 8 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}This is a battle we can't run from.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 8 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}The feelings that created this monster came from within me as well.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 8 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}I couldn't accept reality, so I wished for the past... despite that past harboring death and bloodshed.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 8 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}There isn't a doubt in my mind... This is the cause of all our struggles.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}Sounds good to me. Let's take it down![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}This isn't just a fight against a monster... I'll be facing myself as well. And I'm ready![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 8 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}I won't run away this time... He's watching us, and we can't let him down![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 9 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}This thing's got no chance of beatin' us! And I'm likin' those odds![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 1 54 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}To live means to not give in to your own weaknesses...[n]{f 1 1}
